classes.description: Runtime request cannot be confidently evaluated because policy context or required governance metadata is absent.
classes.operator_action: Correlate run_id, tenant_id, policy_id, and audit_trace_id; confirm whether missing context is expected; escalate to policy owners if unresolved.
classes.slo_impact: May affect runtime governance availability or completeness.

classes.description: Runtime event cannot be joined to an audit trace or evidence export.
classes.operator_action: Verify event emission, audit export availability, and trace propagation before relying on dashboard summaries.

classes.description: Runtime governance evaluation latency exceeds the dashboard threshold.
classes.operator_action: Review latency distribution by tenant_id and policy_id; confirm dependency health before declaring a customer incident.

classes.description: Runtime governance activity requires human approval or override review.
classes.operator_action: Open the human approval workflow, capture rationale, and attach the approval record to the audit trace.
classes.slo_impact: May affect incident response and approval handling objectives.

description: GovAI runtime observability incident taxonomy for local operator triage.
